name: Путь Расколотого
description: Barbarians are defined by their rage, channelling it to unleash brief but potent destruction. Few are brave or unwise enough to study esoteric psychological techniques that split their rage from the rest of their psyche, dividing their identity into two parts: ego and id. When their ego is in control, the Fractured—as these Barbarians are known—possess self-control and cunning beyond most other Barbarians. When they allow their id to take control, their countenance turns monstrous and their bodies swell with the power of rage made physically manifest.
shortDescription: Two Personalities Are Better than One

features.name: Face of Rage
features.description: When you activate your Rage, your countenance distorts and your body swells. Creatures that haven't witnessed your transformation, now or previously, don't recognize you. In addition, while your Rage is active, you gain the following benefits:

details.unarmedStrikeDamage: You can roll {@dice 1d8} in place of the normal damage of your {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, and whenever you deal damage with an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, it can deal your choice of Force damage or its normal damage type.
details.push: When you hit a creature with an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, you can push it 10 feet or force the creature to make a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength modifier and your {@variantrule Proficiency Bonus|XPHB}). On a failed save, the creature has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
details.sizeAndReach: You count as one size larger when determining the success or failure of a Grapple, and when you make an {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB}, your reach is 5 feet greater than normal.

features.name: Mask of Civility
features.description: You are proficient in one of the following skills of your choice: Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, Persuasion, or Religion. In addition, you gain proficiency with one type of {@item Artisan's Tools|XPHB} of your choice or you know one language of your choice.

features.name: Brains and Brawn
features.description: While your Rage is not active, you have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Psychic damage. While your Rage is active, you have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to every damage type except Force and Psychic.

features.name: Cunning and Brutal
features.description: While your Rage is not active, you can take the {@action Disengage|XPHB} or {@action Help|XPHB} action as a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}. While your Rage is active, your attack rolls with {@variantrule Unarmed Strikes|XPHB} score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}.

features.name: Better Half
features.description: When you are reduced to 0 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} and not killed outright, you can drop to 1 {@variantrule Hit Point|XPHB} instead, and you gain {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} equal to half your {@variantrule Hit Point|XPHB} maximum. In addition, if your Rage is active, your Rage ends. If your Rage was not active, immediately activate your Rage (even if you have no remaining uses of your Rage). If any of these {@variantrule Temporary Hit Points|XPHB} remain after 1 minute, they vanish. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
